Footer.desc: With over half a century of experience, we provide the assurance of the world's most powerful brands in your heavy industry and infrastructure projects.
Footer.emailError: Please enter a valid email address.

Hero.desc: As the official distributor of Cedima, DUSS, Ticab, Victor, and GCE brands, we offer uninterrupted engineering and spare part solutions for your heavy industry, road construction, and professional drilling processes.

Pillars.title:
Zero Compromise
in Engineering.
Pillars.p1_desc: With our extensive service network reaching every point in Türkiye, we provide original spare parts and 24/7 maintenance support for your machines.
Pillars.p2_desc: All the global brands we represent meet European engineering standards that guarantee operator safety even in the heaviest industrial conditions.
Pillars.p3_desc: Thanks to our extensive stock network, we minimize potential downtime on-site and deliver products and consumables to the warehouse as quickly as possible.
Pillars.p4_desc: We bring the production power and innovation capability of the brands we represent to your projects in Türkiye with original warranty standards.

Map.title: Engineering Without Borders
Map.desc: With our Türkiye-based logistics network, we export industrial machinery and spare parts to a wide geography, particularly Iraq, Afghanistan, Libya, Djibouti, and Indonesia.

CatalogPage.heroDesc: You can examine all the machinery and spare parts of the global brands we represent, suitable for your project needs, and request a quote instantly.

ContactPage.desc: Contact our expert team for your projects, technical support requests, or business partnerships.

QuotePage.desc: Send us the products or solutions you need, and our sales team will get back to you with custom pricing and detailed information as soon as possible.
QuotePage.formDesc: Please fill out the fields below completely to submit your request.

BrandsPage.heroDesc: We are the authorized engineering and supply point in Türkiye for pioneering international brands that set industry standards in technology and durability.
BrandsPage.formerDesc: Representations we successfully carried out in the past, adding value to Özensan's sector experience.

CareerPage.heroDesc: We continue to grow with over half a century of experience and global business partnerships. We are waiting for your application to become a part of our innovative and dynamic team.
CareerPage.formDesc: Please provide us with information about your expertise and experience by filling out the fields below. Our Human Resources team will review your resume and get back to you.

FAQPage.heroDesc: You can find answers to your questions about our services, distributorships, and after-sales processes here.
FAQPage.notfound: Couldn't find the answer you were looking for? You can contact our team for customized solutions and detailed information.

SolutionsPage.heroDesc: We offer integrated engineering solutions that meet the demanding requirements of different industries, providing high efficiency and occupational safety.

CTA.title: Let's Find the Ideal Solution for Your Project Together
CTA.desc: Contact us to get a project-specific quote from our expert sales engineers or to get detailed information about our machines.

Hero.desc: With over half a century of experience, we provide the assurance of the world's strongest brands in your heavy industry and infrastructure projects.

Management.title: Our Strength Comes From Experience
Management.p1_desc: Our founder who laid the foundations of Özensan and enabled the birth of this industrial giant with his vision.
Management.p2_desc: The leader of modern transformation carrying Özensan to the future with her innovative management approach and global vision.

About.title: The Invisible Power of Projects Building the Future
About.desc1: Our journey, which began in the 1970s, continues today as one of the largest industrial solution partners in Turkey and the region. At Özensan, we have never compromised on quality and reliability since the beginning.
About.desc2: As the official distributor of world-leading brands such as Cedima, DUSS, Ticab, Victor, and GCE in Turkey, we bring the most advanced technologies in the sector to local projects. We provide 360-degree solutions not only with product supply but also with after-sales engineering and spare parts services.

MissionVision.m_desc: To provide world-class industrial machinery and materials with flawless service to maximize the operational efficiency of our customers. To create value by keeping sustainability, occupational safety, and innovation at the center of all our business processes.
MissionVision.v_desc: To be the first industrial technology provider that comes to mind with its reliability and innovative solutions in the Turkish and global markets, shaping the constantly changing industrial dynamics. To lead the sector by combining technology and human potential.

Values.title: Our Core Values
Values.v1_desc: We act with an uncompromising understanding of quality in every product and service we offer.
Values.v2_desc: We keep our promises and establish transparent and honest relationships with our business partners.
Values.v3_desc: We closely follow technological developments in the industry and adapt them for our customers.
